data.content:
Branch: worktree-foolery-de99-fix
Commit: 405fe7e2

Implementation:
- Added `bun run test:smoke:beats:pulldowns`, a Playwright smoke harness for the real `/beats` Queues composition in selection mode at non-zero scroll. It verifies 16 pulldowns, including the RepoSwitcher, bulk edit selects, and visible row-level pulldowns.
- Added stable `data-testid` hooks on the beats page and beat table so browser checks can compare layout boxes directly.
- Fixed the remaining live jitter by overriding `body[data-scroll-locked] { margin-right: 0 !important; }` in `src/app/globals.css`. Chrome DevTools showed Radix scroll lock was adding a 15px body margin and shifting the page horizontally when pulldowns opened.

Validation:
- `bun run test:smoke:beats:pulldowns`
- `bun run lint`
- `bunx tsc --noEmit`
- `bun run test`
- `bun run build`

Chrome DevTools validation on `http://127.0.0.1:3325/beats?view=queues&state=queued&repo=%2FUsers%2Fcartine%2Ffoolery` with a 1440x420 viewport and `scrollY=8`:
- RepoSwitcher before/open metrics: `scrollY 8 -> 8`; trigger/page/filter/table rects unchanged.
- Bulk `Set type...` before/open metrics: `scrollY 8 -> 8`; trigger/page/filter/table rects unchanged.
